what: Scan, Document, Copy and Convert Contents of a Directory
title: Scan, Document, Copy and Convert Contents of a Directory
text: eatArchive helps automate archiving directory contents using open, software-agnostic file formats. package supports scanning nested directories, copying files new folder structure, converting selected formats (e.g., XLSX CSV, DOCX PDF/). step documented machine-readable CSV log records source paths, destination paths, format conversions applied.

title: Scan, Document, Copy and Convert Contents of a Directory
text: can install development version eatArchive Github

title: Scan, Document, Copy and Convert Contents of a Directory
text: schematic representation workflow, consisting three major steps: R function write_directory_report() generating excel file documenting contents directory selecting files archive, specifying archival subdirectory excel file R function create_archive_from report() reading excel file, copying converting files original directory archival directory

what: Create an archival directory of all files in a directory — create_archive_from_directory
title: Create an archival directory of all files in a directory — create_archive_from_directory
text: Create archival directory files directory

title: Create an archival directory of all files in a directory — create_archive_from_directory
code: create_archive_from_directory(   path_to_working_directory,   path_to_archive_directory,   exclude_folders = "_Archive",   convert = TRUE,   overwrite = FALSE,   csv = "csv" )

title: Create an archival directory of all files in a directory — create_archive_from_directory
text: path_to_working_directory Character. Path working directory archived. path_to_archive_directory Character. Path indicating create archival directory. exclude_folders Character vector. Names subfolders exclude processing. convert Logical, indicating whether convert file formats . Current files conversion : xlsx –> csv: sheet excel file converted csv file xlsm –> csv: sheet excel macro file converted csv file sav  –> csv: SPSS data files converted two csv files (data, metadata) eml  –> txt: Thunderbird email objects (eml-files) converted txt-files docx –> txt: word files converted txt files doc –> txt: word files converted txt files overwrite Logical, indicating whether overwrite existing files archival directory. csv Character specifying csv type "csv" uses "." decimal point "," separator "csv2" uses "," decimal point ";" separator, Excel convention CSV files Western European locales.

title: Create an archival directory of all files in a directory — create_archive_from_directory
text: Folder documentation files copied.

what: Search a directory for specific files (date, size) — scan_directory
title: Search a directory for specific files (date, size) — scan_directory
text: Scans immediate subfolder specified directory (excluding listed exclude_folders) writes Excel file containing file-level metadata specific files. Files can selected size date last modification.

title: Search a directory for specific files (date, size) — scan_directory
code: scan_directory(   dir,   path_to_report,   exclude_folders = "",   show_what = c("largest", "smallest", "newest", "oldest"),   show_max = 1000,   overwrite = FALSE )

title: Search a directory for specific files (date, size) — scan_directory
text: dir Character. Path directory whose immediate subfolders scanned. path_to_report Character. Path Excel file written (e.g., "C:/study/dir_report.xlsx"). exclude_folders Character vector. Names subfolders exclude processing. show_what Character, indicating whehter sort size date. "largest" sorting file size (large small) "smallest" sorting file size (small large) "newest" sorting date last modification (new old) "oldest" sorting date last modification (old new) show_max Numeric, indicating maximum number files include report. overwrite Logical, indicating whether overwrite existing report.

title: Search a directory for specific files (date, size) — scan_directory
text: Invisibly returns path written Excel file.

title: Search a directory for specific files (date, size) — scan_directory
text: Excel workbook includes recursive listing files meeting search criteria (including sub-subfolders). Files located subfolder whose name matches one entries exclude_folders excluded entirely (.e., scanned listed).

what: Create an Excel workbook with metadata for all subfolders of a directory — write_directory_report
title: Create an Excel workbook with metadata for all subfolders of a directory — write_directory_report
text: Scans immediate subfolder specified directory (excluding listed exclude_folders) writes Excel file containing file-level metadata. subfolder gets sheet, listing files (recursively) name, size, last modified timestamp. Optionally, additional column named "Archive" included sheet. values "Archive" later used create_archive() indicate destination folder copying converting files.

title: Create an Excel workbook with metadata for all subfolders of a directory — write_directory_report
code: write_directory_report(   dir,   path_to_directory_report,   exclude_folders = "_Archive",   autocomplete_values = NA,   overwrite = FALSE )

title: Create an Excel workbook with metadata for all subfolders of a directory — write_directory_report
text: dir Character. Path directory whose immediate subfolders scanned. path_to_directory_report Character. Path Excel file written (e.g., "C:/study/dir_report.xlsx"). exclude_folders Character vector. Names subfolders exclude processing. autocomplete_values Optional. Controls whether "Archive" column included () autocomplete values provided: NULL, "Archive" column included. NA, column "Archive" included autocomplete filtering Excel available. character vector provided, column "Archive" included autocomplete filtering Excel enabled, making easier assign target folders file archiving. overwrite Logical, indicating whether overwrite existing report.

title: Create an Excel workbook with metadata for all subfolders of a directory — write_directory_report
text: Invisibly returns path written Excel file.

title: Create an Excel workbook with metadata for all subfolders of a directory — write_directory_report
text: Excel workbook includes: One sheet per immediate subfolder specified directory sheet contains recursive listing files subfolder (including sub-subfolders) Optional autocomplete rows inserted directly header (e.g., manual annotation) Column widths light styling improved readability Files located subfolder whose name matches one entries exclude_folders excluded entirely (.e., scanned listed). function intended part file management workflow files may later reviewed, copied, converted based generated metadata file.

title: Create an Excel workbook with metadata for all subfolders of a directory — write_directory_report
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Write metadata for all subfolders of "my_project/" write_directory_report("my_project/", "metadata_summary.xlsx")  # Include an autocomplete row with names of archival folders write_directory_report("my_project/", "summary.xlsx", autocomplete_values = c("contracts", "data"))  # Include all subfolders (do not exclude any) write_directory_report("my_project/", "summary.xlsx", exclude_folders = NULL) } # }
